title: CCP-16.3: Channel selection and balancing logic
description: Add load-based channel selection in link layer or PHY (hash or rendezvous method from da2q). Integrate with RPL parent selection preferring low-load parents. Update lora-phy and lichen/link. Add test vectors. Acceptance: multi-channel TX uses balanced channels, capacity improved in sim.
close_reason: Implemented load-based channel selection with hash/rendezvous, RPL parent load preference, updated lora_l2 and dodag; tests pass, balanced multi-channel TX verified in sim
